title: schrankia halliana
intro: Schrankia halliana, also known as the Indian snakeroot, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Schrankia halliana include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Schrankia halliana can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
